equipment.name: Angelsteel weapon
equipment.desc: One weapon of the model gains the "Life curse" ability.

equipment.name: Aura of Fervor
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain +1 Attack until the end of the current battle round, when they perform a Charge command.

equipment.name: Avenging Angel
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll 1 to hit and 1 to wound roll each activation for each friendly unit that has been killed during the game.

equipment.name: Black Rage
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Attack and the "Blind Rage" and "Furious Charge" abilities. It can only join units with the "Blind Rage" ability.

equipment.name: Chalice of Blood
equipment.desc: The model and an attached unit receive a +1 bonus to melee hit rolls. The model also receives an additional +1 Initiative. Unique. Only for Apothecaries.

equipment.name: Executioner
equipment.desc: The model may choose to make some or all melee attacks at Initiative 1, but gains +1 Damage for these attacks.

equipment.name: Gleaming Pinions
equipment.desc: The model rolls 1D6 less for scatter, when it is deployed via the rules for Deep Strike.

equipment.name: Lord of Death
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Strength and +1 Toughness. If you pass a Leadership test during your activation, all melee attacks against one single enemy model in direct base contact may re-roll all to hit rolls. Unique. Only for Librarians.

equipment.name: Overcharged engine
equipment.desc: Instead of shooting, a vehicle can move an additional 1d6". At the end of the additional movement, the vehicle must make a difficult terrain test. The additional movement does not count towards the distance the vehicle has moved in relation to passenger orders.

equipment.name: Overcharged engine
equipment.desc: Instead of shooting, a vehicle can move an additional 1d6". At the end of the additional movement, the vehicle must make a difficult terrain test. The additional movement does not count towards the distance the vehicle has moved in relation to passenger orders.
